title: Tallon Christmas Label Gift Stickers – Pack of 100 Self-Adhesive Tags in 8 Festive Designs – Seasonal Stickers for Wrapping & Packaging
features: PACK OF 100 LABELS – Contains 100 self-adhesive label stickers for seasonal use
8 FESTIVE DESIGNS – Includes Santa, penguins, reindeer and snowmen artwork
EASY TO USE – Peel-and-stick format makes wrapping fast and tidy
VERSATILE APPLICATION – Suitable for paper, gift bags, boxes and envelopes
COLOURFUL & FUN – Bright artwork adds festive charm to all your parcels
description: Add a festive finishing touch to your wrapping with these Tallon Christmas label stickers. Each pack includes 100 self-adhesive tags across 8 cheerful designs, featuring Santa, penguins, snowmen and reindeer. With vibrant colours and playful artwork, they’re perfect for bringing extra charm to your seasonal parcels. Each label has a clear “To” and “From” section, making them easy to personalise. The peel-and-stick format ensures quick application, helping you keep your wrapping neat and organised. These versatile labels can be used on paper, festive bags, boxes or envelopes, making them an essential part of your packaging supplies. Perfect for use on family parcels, workplace Secret Santa items or children’s presents, these label stickers help make every package look bright and ready for the celebrations.
